scripts.check: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test:coverage && pnpm run api:check && pnpm run migration-check && pnpm run pack:check && pnpm run release-readiness
scripts.contract: pnpm run api:check && pnpm run packed-smoke
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @0disoft/openfeature-local-provider test && pnpm run test:api-tools && pnpm run test:benchmark-tools && pnpm run test:migration-tools && pnpm run test:release-tools
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm --filter @0disoft/openfeature-local-provider exec vitest run --coverage && pnpm run test:api-tools && pnpm run test:benchmark-tools && pnpm run test:migration-tools && pnpm run test:release-tools
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @0disoft/openfeature-local-provider typecheck && pnpm --filter @0disoft/openfeature-local-provider build && tsc -p examples/node-basic/tsconfig.json --noEmit
